title: The Reason for the Dismissal of Bukayr and Appointment of Umayyah
description: and Appointment of Umayyah According to Abu al-Ha$an,30 Bukayr b. Wishah ruled as governor Lila kunta ra'saha-"whenever there is internal strife, you are always at the head of it!" 29. See Ibn A'tham al-Kiifi,Futub, VI, 288-90, Ibn Khayyal, Ta rikh, 297 (year 73 1692- 6931); Balidhuri, Futi, 416, and Ansdb, IVB, 152-54, 164-66; Ya'qubi, Ta'rikh, II, 324, and Buldan, JBGA, VII), 299; Gardiii, Zayn al-akhbdr (Tehran, 1374 solar), io8f. (year 72 16 6921, but very garbled); In al-Athir, Kdmil, IV, 367f.; Ibn Kathir, Biddyah, PC, 3s El2, s.v. Bukayr b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
